message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>We analyze confirmed cases and new hospitalizations in Wisconsin in the weeks surrounding the April 7, 2020 election, and find no evidence of a surge in SARS-CoV-2 transmission.</jats:p>
title: No Detectable Surge in SARS-CoV-2 Transmission due to the April 7, 2020 Wisconsin Election
